topics.title: Lounge
topics.content:
## Lounge

The Lounge provides a chat-style sidebar for quickly browsing and hopping between agents across all projects.

### Circles
Agents are grouped into collapsible circles — by default, one per project. Create custom circles, assign emojis, and drag agents between them.

### Features
- Right-click agents to move between circles
- Right-click circles to rename or delete
- Drag-and-drop agents and reorder circles
- Emoji icons for circles
- Configuration persists across sessions

### Disambiguation
When multiple agents share a name, they are shown as **project/agent** to avoid confusion.
